name: 3 Questions: Beyond data-driven aesthetics
summary: In a new Keller Gallery exhibition, Alexandros Haridis SM ’17, PhD ’22 traces centuries of ideas about aesthetic judgment and explores how design can make complex computational systems visible.

author: School of Architecture and Planning
